metadata.purpose: Cross-reference of board members across target foundations and sailing network organizations

sailing_network.name: Bay Area Association of Disabled Sailors (BAADS)

multi_board_connectors.name: PAUL HEINEKEN
multi_board_connectors.notes: Triple connector. MD. Volunteer coach UC Berkeley sailing. Former Cal Sailing Club volunteer (10 yrs). Bridges all three key Bay Area sailing institutions.

multi_board_connectors.name: BILL KREYSLER
multi_board_connectors.notes: SFSF Past President + TISC Chairman. CEO of Kreysler & Associates (composite manufacturing, Napa).

multi_board_connectors.name: ROLF KAISER
multi_board_connectors.notes: Current SFSF President. Stanford sailing team captain. Founding member Vanguard 15 fleet at TISC (since 2000). Runs MediaOne Studios/DigiPowers.

multi_board_connectors.name: CAROLYN PATRICK
multi_board_connectors.notes: Formal bridge between SFSF and StFYC. Her 'StFYC BOD Liaison' role means she officially connects the two organizations.

multi_board_connectors.name: PAMELA HEALY
multi_board_connectors.notes: SFSF Past President with national sailing connections through US Sailing. Rated HIGH (not HIGHEST) because her 3rd board (US Sailing) is national, not Bay Area local.

multi_board_connectors.name: WILLIAM HOEHLER
multi_board_connectors.notes: Financial/admin role at both SFSF and TISC. Knows the operational side of both orgs.

multi_board_connectors.name: PAM RORKE LEVY

boards.org: National Sailing Hall of Fame & Museum

multi_board_connectors.notes: Also Trustee/Chair at SF Art Institute. National sailing connections through HOF.

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Rolf Kaiser
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: Current SFSF President. Can champion VetsBoats grant application AND make warm intros to Hutton network.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Warm intro, then SFSF grant application (Apr 2026 cycle)

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Paul Heineken, MD
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: Triple connector (SFSF/TISC/StFYC). Community sailing champion. Most likely to proactively help.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Warm intro through TISC or Bay Area sailing community

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Bill Kreysler
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: SFSF Past President + TISC Chairman. Business leader who can mobilize resources.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Warm intro through TISC or sailing community

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Maureen Roddy
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: SFSF Grants Chair. Gatekeeper for grant funding.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Intro before SFSF grant application. Apply via grants@stfsf.org

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Wende S. Hutton
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: Hutton Family Foundation President. Best thematic match. Preselected-only.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Warm intro ONLY through SFSF or sailing network contacts. Do NOT cold-contact.

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Peter D. Goldman
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: Judd Goldman Adaptive Sailing President. Peer org connection. Path to Jerome Mirza funding.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Peer outreach (adaptive sailing conversation). Long-play for Mirza referral.

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Paul Cayard
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: America's Cup legend. Name carries weight for endorsement/introductions.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Approach through StFYC mutual contacts. Ask for advice/visit, not money.

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Deborah D. Parsons
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: Jerome Mirza Foundation President. $50K/yr to Judd Goldman.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: DO NOT contact directly. Path is through Peter Goldman referral only.

recommended_outreach_priority.name: Carisa Harris-Adamson, PhD
recommended_outreach_priority.reason: Former TISC President. UCSF/UC Berkeley professor. Bridges academia and sailing nonprofits.
recommended_outreach_priority.action: Warm intro through TISC contacts. Academic/community connector, not a funder.
